---
title: "DB Schema"
subtitle: A proposed database design based on Vannmilijø Data 
---

The page shows the database schema diagram along with table definitions based on the Vannmilijø dataset.

## DB Schema Diagram
The proposed database design shown in the ER (Entity Relationship) diagram below contains six tables including three meta (entity) tables, one variable (look-up or reference) table, one fact (measurement) table, and one mixed meta and measurement table.

The columns with `PK` in the diagram indicate primary keys of the table, which guarantees unique identifications.

![](./image/vannmilijo_db.webp){.zoomable}
